narrative:
Commercial Point-West (precinct in Pickaway County) has 769 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.3 percentage points.
